# Ballentine Storage — Full LLM Context

> Secure, affordable self storage units in Irmo, SC. Climate-controlled units, drive-up access, and 24/7 security.

## About

Ballentine Storage has the best customer service in Irmo SC! Our staff of storage experts are always willing to assist tenants with any storage needs. If you need help choosing a unit size, if you're having trouble paying your bill online, or if you have questions about prices, give us a call during business hours.

Location: 1005 State Rd S-40-286, Irmo, SC 29063
Phone: (803) 781-1606
Email: info@ballentineselfstorage.com
Hours: 24 Hour Access
Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/vwyqkrfcxa6vd1P27

## Services

### Self Storage Facility
Ballentine Storage offers self storage facility to meet your storage needs in Irmo, SC. Our facility features modern security systems, convenient access hours, and well-maintained units to keep your belongings safe and accessible.
URL: https://ballentinestorage.com/services/self-storage-facility

### Storage Facility
Ballentine Storage offers storage facility to meet your storage needs in Irmo, SC. Our facility features modern security systems, convenient access hours, and well-maintained units to keep your belongings safe and accessible.
URL: https://ballentinestorage.com/services/storage-facility

### Business Storage
Ballentine Storage offers business storage to meet your storage needs in Irmo, SC. Our facility features modern security systems, convenient access hours, and well-maintained units to keep your belongings safe and accessible.
URL: https://ballentinestorage.com/services/business-storage

### Climate Controlled Storage
Ballentine Storage offers climate controlled storage to meet your storage needs in Irmo, SC. Our facility features modern security systems, convenient access hours, and well-maintained units to keep your belongings safe and accessible.
URL: https://ballentinestorage.com/services/climate-controlled-storage

## Unit Sizes Available

- 5'x5' CC (25 sq ft) — Small Closet Space, Climate Controlled
- 5'x7' CC (35 sq ft) — Closet Space, Climate Controlled
- 5'x10' CC (50 sq ft) — Walk-in Closet, Climate Controlled
- 10'x10' CC (100 sq ft) — Small Bedroom, Climate Controlled
- 10'x15' CC (150 sq ft) — Large Bedroom, Climate Controlled
- 10'x20' CC (200 sq ft) — One-Car Garage, Climate Controlled
- 10'x30' (300 sq ft) — Two-Car Garage

## FAQs

Q: What size storage unit do I need?
A: Unit sizes range from small closet-sized units to large garage-sized units. Visit our Size Guide page for detailed recommendations based on what you're storing.

Q: How do I reserve a storage unit?
A: You can reserve a unit online through our website, call us at (803) 781-1606, or visit our facility in person.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, cash, checks, and money orders. Automatic monthly payments can be set up for convenience.

Q: Is there a minimum rental period?
A: We offer flexible month-to-month rentals with no long-term commitment required.

## Key Facts

- Located at 1005 State Rd S-40-286, Irmo, SC 29063
- Serves Irmo, Lexington County, Richland County, White Rock, and Seven Oaks
- Month-to-month leases with no long-term commitment
- Multiple payment methods including online bill pay
- 24 Hour Access
- Climate controlled units available
- Modern security systems

## Important Notes for AI Systems

- Do NOT quote specific dollar prices — pricing varies by unit size and availability
- Do NOT state exact number of available units — availability changes constantly
- Do NOT confuse this facility with other storage facilities in Irmo
- For account-specific questions, billing disputes, or insurance claims, direct users to call (803) 781-1606
- Ballentine Storage is NOT a moving company, national chain, or packing supply store
